name: Shadow Fiend
description: So, you're curious where I come from? There's one easy way to find out for yourself. Nevermore, the Shadow Fiend.

abilities.name: Necromastery
abilities.description: Grants bonus attack damage per stack from unit kills, and loses a portion of stacks upon death. Harvested souls swirl in and out of the Abysm, empowering the Shadow Fiend to increase the size of his collection. Stacks Lost on Death Factor: 0.7. Attack Damage Bonus per Stack: 1/2/3/4 (6/7/8/9).

abilities.name: Shadowraze
abilities.description: Shadow Fiend razes the ground a short distance away from him, dealing damage to enemy units in the area. Shadow Fiend razes the ground a longer distance away from him, dealing damage to enemy units in the area. Effect Radius: 250. Base Damage: 90/160/230/300 (92/162/232/302). Damage Increase per Stack: 35/50/65/80 (65/80/95/110). Stack Duration: 7. Instant Attack Factor: (1). Distance: 200. Mana Cost: 9.

abilities.name: Feast of Souls
abilities.description: Grants self bonus attack speed for an amount of time. The frenzy state increases the Necromastery stack limit but consumes some at the end of the process. Move Speed Bonus: 5%/7%/9%/11%. Attack Speed Bonus: 40/55/70/85 (70/85/100/115). Duration: 8. Cast Animation Factor: 0.7. Cooldown: 60/65/70/75.

abilities.name: Presence of the Dark Lord
abilities.description: The presence itself reduces the armor of enemy units within the radius. Aura Radius: 1200. Armor Reduction: 3/4/5/6 (5/6/7/8). Aura Linger Duration: 0.5.

abilities.name: Requiem of Souls
abilities.description: Creates a damaging line projectile per Necromastery stack. Max Travel Radius: 1000. Lines Starting Width: 125. Lines End Radius: 300. Damage per Line: 80/120/160. Move Speed Slow: 20%/25%/30%. Magic Resist Reduction: 10%. Cooldown: 120/110/100. Mana Cost: 150/175/200.
